title: Account Executive
description:
The Account Executive will own the full end-to-end sales cycle for Thematic in Singapore and the broader region. This role is responsible for building and managing a pipeline through targeted outbound prospecting, events, partner/warm-intro networks, and inbound follow-up; qualifying opportunities; running discovery; presenting tailored demos; building business cases; and closing new business. The role will also manage commercial negotiations (pricing, packaging, procurement), and partner closely with Customer Success and Product to ensure smooth onboarding, retention, renewals, and expansion for strategic accounts. Success will be measured through pipeline creation, conversion rates, new ARR closed, renewal/expansion growth, and forecast accuracy/CRM hygiene.

Job Requirements:

  • Own revenue outcomes for assigned accounts/territory, including new business and expansion, with accurate forecasting and disciplined CRM updates.
  • Own the full sales cycle, including prospecting, qualifying, and closing deals
  • Create proposals and negotiate pricing
  • Run local personalized outbound campaigns
  • Attend events and get warm intros to the right people
  • Build a relationship with our existing customers and help renew and expand usage
  • Learn the differentiators and benefits of our product

Skills & Competencies:

First things first, you have to be based in this region! This is where the bulk of our potential clients are, and it will help you succeed

  • 10+ B2B SaaS sales experience as an account executive at companies like Qualtrics, Medallia, InMoment, Forsta, and similar companies in our space
  • Have sold to buyers in Customer Experience, Insights, or Market Research. You can speak our buyer's data and insights language
  • Full-cycle B2B SaaS sales (prospecting → close), pipeline generation, outbound strategy
  • Discovery, MEDDICC/SPICED-style qualification, consultative/value-based selling
  • Commercial negotiation (pricing, packaging, procurement) and proposal writing
  • Executive communication, stakeholder management, rapport building
  • Ability to build ROI and business cases with executives
  • Cross-functional collaboration with Product, Marketing, Customer Success, and RevOps
  • Strong commercial judgment and decision-making under pressure
  • Informal deal leadership and best-practice sharing
  • Creation of repeatable sales processes and playbooks
  • CRM discipline (e.g., Salesforce/HubSpot), forecasting, territory planning
  • Hunter mindset + growth mindset; experimentation with messaging/campaigns
  • Customer expansion/renewals in partnership with CS; account planning
  • Regional travel up to ~25%; strong interest in applied AI and its limitations
